prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training day - high-endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate and hydration focus

solution_criteria: Total daily calories meet or exceed 3000 kcal
Hydration timing is specified around training/meals
Meal plan is presented in compact 1-day format with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathoner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates and hydration timing

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength through weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre/post-workout nutrition
Protein intake is prioritized (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight)
Includes balanced macronutrients supporting strength training goals
Provides practical, compact meal descriptions suitable for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring balanced macros with protein-focused meals and pre/post-workout nutrition

solution_criteria: Meal plan is exactly 1 day with all meals specified
All foods are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Includes complete protein sources (legumes, nuts, seeds, or combinations) in at least 2 meals
Contains iron-rich plant foods (leafy greens, legumes, fortified grains) distributed across meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan endurance runner) requiring complete protein sources and iron-rich foods within caloric needs
